actions.title: Use an allowed preview profile
actions.summary: Regenerate the staged preview with a preview profile that is explicitly allowed for the selected exchange gate.
recommendedSteps: Inspect the target interoperability readiness profile and its allowed preview profiles.
Select a compatible staged preview profile from interoperability://manifest.
Regenerate the preview and rerun the readiness assessment.

actions.title: Regenerate preview from the supplied dossier
actions.summary: The staged preview must be rebuilt from the same version-pinned dossier used for the readiness assessment.
recommendedSteps: Verify which dossier was used to create the staged preview.
Recreate the preview directly from the supplied version-pinned dossier.
Rerun the readiness assessment with the regenerated preview.

actions.title: Complete required preview fields
actions.summary: Required mapped fields are missing from the staged preview and must be restored before the gate can advance.
recommendedSteps: Inspect missing_required_fields in the staged preview.
Restore the missing source data or governance snapshot on the version-pinned dossier.
Regenerate the staged preview and rerun the readiness assessment.

actions.title: Fix empty target document output
actions.summary: The staged preview did not emit a target document and requires mapping or input compatibility fixes.
recommendedSteps: Inspect the selected preview profile mappings.
Confirm the staged dossier contains fields addressed by the preview profile.
Regenerate the preview after correcting the mapping or input issue.

actions.title: Upgrade linked dossier readiness
actions.summary: The linked version-pinned dossier does not satisfy the dossier-readiness profile required by the selected exchange gate.
recommendedSteps: Review the linked dossier readiness assessment and its blocking or warning rules.
Resolve governance, disclaimer, fingerprint, or source-status issues on the version-pinned dossier.
Rerun both dossier readiness and interoperability readiness after the dossier is corrected.

actions.title: Review unsupported preview fields
actions.summary: Unsupported local-only fields remain in the staged preview workflow and require review before relying on the current gate outcome.
recommendedSteps: Inspect unsupported_field_paths in the readiness assessment.
Decide whether each field should remain MCP-internal or be added to a future preview profile revision.
Regenerate the preview or document the manual handling path.

actions.title: Replace non-direct mappings
actions.summary: Derived or review-required mappings remain in the staged preview and block or downgrade the selected exchange gate.
recommendedSteps: Inspect derived_mapping_paths and review_required_mapping_paths in the readiness assessment.
Replace provisional mappings with governed direct mappings where possible.
Reassess the preview after the mapping profile is hardened.
